prompt:
You are a Vue.js expert working on a monorepo project that uses a shared UI component library.

Your task: implement a complete registration form in `apps/web/src/registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue`.

You may also write `apps/web/src/registration/types/index.ts` to define the Zod schema and types.

---

## Project structure

This is a Turborepo monorepo. The web app is in `apps/web/`. It depends on a workspace package called `elements` that provides all form components.

Use `list_files` to explore the project. Use `read_file` to inspect component APIs before using them.

Use `query_rag` to search for code examples. Good queries:
- "basic form with Form FormFields FormActions"
- "checkbox reveals conditional field"
- "radio group options"
- "zod schema optional superRefine"
- "textarea full form example"

---

## Requirements

Implement `RegistrationForm.vue` with the following fields:

| Field | Component | Notes |
|-------|-----------|-------|
| `username` | ControlledInput | required, min 3 chars |
| `email` | ControlledInput (type="email") | required, valid email |
| `role` | ControlledRadioGroup | options: "user", "admin", "contributor" |
| `otherInfo` | ControlledInput | **visible only when role === "contributor"** |
| `newsletter` | ControlledCheckbox | |
| `frequency` | ControlledRadioGroup | options: "daily", "weekly", "monthly" — **visible only when newsletter is checked** |
| `bio` | ControlledTextarea | optional |

All components are imported from `"elements"`.

Define a Zod schema with `.superRefine()` for conditional validation:
- `otherInfo` is required when `role === "contributor"`
- `frequency` is required when `newsletter === true`

---

## Workflow

1. Call `query_rag` to find the patterns you need.
2. Write the file with `write_file` — it only writes and returns `"File written."`, it does NOT compile.
3. Call `run_compilation` to get TypeScript feedback.
4. If there are errors, fix them with `write_file` and call `run_compilation` again.
5. Only call `final_answer` after `run_compilation` returns `"Compilation succeeded."`

---

## Tool Call Format

When calling a tool, output ONLY a valid JSON code block — no explanation, no reasoning text before or after it:

```json
{
  "name": "write_file",
  "arguments": {
    "path": "apps/web/src/registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue",
    "content": "line1\nline2\nline3"
  }
}
```

Rules for valid JSON strings:
- Newlines inside strings MUST be written as `\n` (backslash + n), NOT as actual line breaks
- Double quotes inside strings MUST be escaped as `\"`

WRONG — text before the JSON block will be rejected:
```
Here is my implementation...
```json
{ "name": "write_file", ... }
```
```

CORRECT — the JSON code block is the entire response, nothing else.

runs.output_code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { ControlledCheckbox, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledTextarea, Form, FormActions, FormFields } from "elements";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues, type RegistrationFormValues } from "../types";

const roles = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencies = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
];

const initialValues: RegistrationFormValues = registrationInitialValues;

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="initialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Choose a username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="name@example.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roles"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Information"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter === true"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequency"
        :options="frequencies"
        orientation="vertical"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <button
        type="submit"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
        class="bg-blue-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded disabled:opacity-50"
      >
        Submit
      </button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ControlledCheckbox, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledTextarea, Form, FormActions, FormFields } from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";
import type { RegistrationFormValues, registrationInitialValues, registrationSchema } from "../types";
import { useRouter } from "vue-router";

const router = useRouter();

const roles = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencies = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
];

const initialValues: RegistrationFormValues = registrationInitialValues;

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);
    router.push("/");
    return values;
  },
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="initialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Choose a username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="name@example.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roles"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Information"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter === true"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequency"
        :options="frequencies"
        orientation="vertical"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <button
        type="submit"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting"
        class="bg-blue-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded disabled:opacity-50"
      >
        Submit
      </button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

import { ControlledCheckbox, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledTextarea, Form, FormActions, FormFields } from "elements";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues, type RegistrationFormValues } from "../types";

  { value: "user", label: "User" },

  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },

runs.output_code:
<!--
  Registration Form with conditional fields based on user role and preferences.

  Conditional visibility:
  - otherInfo: visible only when role === "contributor"
  - frequency: visible only when newsletter is true

  Conditional validation:
  - otherInfo is required when role === "contributor"
  - frequency is required when newsletter is true
-->
<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";
import {
  registrationSchema,
  type RegistrationFormValues,
  registrationInitialValues,
} from "../types";

type FormValues = RegistrationFormValues;

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: FormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
];
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username input -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="il tuo username"
        @input="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email input -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="nome@esempio.com"
        @input="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role radio group -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Ruolo"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo: visible only when role === "contributor" -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Informazioni extra"
        placeholder="Descrivi il tuo contributo"
        @input="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Iscriviti alla newsletter"
        @input="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency radio group: visible only when newsletter is checked -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequenza newsletter"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio textarea -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Raccontaci qualcosa di te..."
        @input="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }" class="mt-6">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Registrati
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

<!--
  Registration Form with conditional fields based on user role and preferences.

  Conditional visibility:
  - otherInfo: visible only when role === "contributor"
  - frequency: visible only when newsletter is true

  Conditional validation:
  - otherInfo is required when role === "contributor"
  - frequency is required when newsletter is true
-->
<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";
import {
  registrationSchema,
  type RegistrationFormValues,
  registrationInitialValues,
} from "../types";

type FormValues = RegistrationFormValues;

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: FormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
];
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username input -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="il tuo username"
        @input="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email input -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="nome@esempio.com"
        @input="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role radio group -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Ruolo"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo: visible only when role === "contributor" -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Informazioni extra"
        placeholder="Descrivi il tuo contributo"
        @input="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Iscriviti alla newsletter"
        @input="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency radio group: visible only when newsletter is checked -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequenza newsletter"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio textarea -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Raccontaci qualcosa di te..."
        @input="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }" class="mt-6">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Registrati
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

args.answer:
The registration form has been successfully implemented with all required fields and conditional validation:

1. **apps/web/src/registration/types/index.ts** - Contains the Zod schema with:
   - Basic fields: username (min 3), email (valid), role (enum)
   - Conditional fields: otherInfo (optional, required when role === contributor), newsletter (boolean), frequency (enum, required when newsletter is true), bio (optional)
   - superRefine validation for conditional requirements
   - Initial values and TypeScript types

2. **apps/web/src/registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue** - Contains the complete form with:
   - ControlledInput for username and email
   - ControlledRadioGroup for role selection
   - ControlledInput for otherInfo (visible only when role === contributor)
   - ControlledCheckbox for newsletter
   - ControlledRadioGroup for frequency (visible only when newsletter is checked)
   - ControlledTextarea for bio
   - Vee-validate Form integration with proper error handling

Both files compile successfully with no TypeScript errors.
